evt-q1-audit.summary: Q1 Internal Audit Window — Quality Team
evt-q1-audit.description: Quarterly internal audit of receiving operations — Q1 (January–March receipts). Conducted by Theo Brandt and Quality team. Respond to record retrieval requests within 1 business day. Do not modify records under audit review.

evt-holiday-memorial-day.description: Company-observed holiday. Receiving dock unavailable. No inbound shipments accepted.

evt-holiday-independence-day.description: Company-observed holiday. Independence Day observed on Friday July 3. Receiving dock unavailable. No inbound shipments accepted.

evt-summer-shutdown.description: Scheduled annual summer maintenance shutdown. Plant closed Monday through Friday. Receiving dock unavailable. Inbound shipments scheduled during this week must be rescheduled.
